signals.headline: Cavaliers take 2-0 series lead over Raptors in Eastern Conference first-round playoffs after 115-105 Game 2 win on Monda
signals.raw: Cavaliers take 2-0 series lead over Raptors in Eastern Conference first-round playoffs after 115-105 Game 2 win on Monday.**[1][3]
matched_markets: NBA Playoffs: Who Will Win Series? - Raptors vs. Cavaliers

signals.headline: YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1]
signals.raw:
YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1]  

Cavaliers' star trio—Donovan Mitchell (30 pts), James Harden (28 pts), Evan Mobley (25 pts)—powered the victory, extending Cleveland's playoff win streak vs. Toronto to 12 games (an NBA record).[1][3]  
Raptors' Scottie Barnes hit a playoff career-high 26 pts, but Brandon Ingram struggled (7 pts on 3-15 FG); series shifts to Game 3 in Toronto on Thursday.[1][2]
